name: IDEX CORP /DE/
summary: PART I . Overview IDEX Corporation (IDEX, the Company, we, or our) is a global applied solutions provider serving niche markets with mission critical components for everyday life. Substantially all of the Companys business activities are carried out through over 50 wholly-owned subsidiaries with shared values of Trust, Team and Excellence.
